quotes: Headlines/headings:** Brand Blue (or White on dark/gradient backgrounds)
Body text:** Graphite #212121 on light backgrounds; White on dark backgrounds
Body text:** Graphite #212121 on light backgrounds
Line height: minimum 150% for all body copy** (brand accessibility rule). **For light text on dark backgrounds, increase further** — [GENERAL] use 160%
Line height: minimum 150% for all body copy
Links [GENERAL]:** Brand Blue #00529b, underlined, on light backgrounds; White underlined on dark
Brand Blue #00529b, underlined, on light backgrounds
The logo icon's **70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances** (logo, and when the mark is used as a pattern/graphic).
70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances
Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast
Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown).
Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications
mark sits at the lightest end
mark sits at the lightest end
Brand Blue → Dark Navy | `#00529b` → `#011E45` | Dark backgrounds, blue masthead/waves
Sky Blue → Deep Blue | `#358CCB` → `#003D74` | Blue backgrounds, waves
Golden Sand → White → Light Blue | `#FEF1C8` → `#ffffff` → `#E6F0F9` | Soft light backgrounds
Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine | `#FEF1C8` → Gold @75% → `#faa31b` | Warm light-to-saturated backgrounds
Headlines & headers | **Agenda** (Adobe font) | **Nunito Sans** (Google font), bolder weights, Title Case; *Agenda may be used as live text in digital for the campaign headline only* | **Aptos**
Footers, fine print | Nunito Sans | Nunito Sans | Aptos
Email font stack (CSS):** `'Nunito Sans', Verdana, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif`
Email font stack (CSS):** `'Nunito Sans', Verdana, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif`
H1 (section hero headline): 28px / 36px (≈130%), Nunito Sans ExtraBold or Bold
H3 (subhead): 18px / 26px (≈144%), Nunito Sans Bold or SemiBold
Secondary/supporting body: 14px / 21px (150%), Nunito Sans Regular — use sparingly, never for primary content

tokens.notes: Use sparingly, never for primary content.

quotes: Always write **LISRAYA** in ALL CAPS in all written materials
Generic name format: lowercase, in parentheses: `(brepocitinib)`.
Set in **Agenda** (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).
Set in **Agenda** (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).
Available Agenda weights: Light, Regular, Medium, Semibold, Bold.
Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.
Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements
The letters **"D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color
Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue**
Brand Blue** (tinted letters at 40% of the same hue)
Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue**
Main callout (key point):** Bold **Brand Blue (#00529b)** text
Gold (#ffc60a) horizontal rules above and below
Gold (#ffc60a) horizontal rules above and below

collapses to single column on mobile

centered, in the **lower-middle** below the headline

Images are housed in the **Accent shape** (§2.5) — asymmetric rounded-corner crops, not plain rectangles or circles.

charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners

with a thin Gold rule beneath
